P2a_recovery_probe.refc_covariate_shift_blind: lateral recovery_ratio 0.0074 [0.0036,0.0115] at 1.0m (corrects <1% of the offset); yaw negligible/wrong-signed. n=881 windows/40 eps. Direct mechanism behind plan_xte 0.57->12.98m.

P2b_recovery_aug_ft.verdict: WIN on primary (corridor_departure) WITH a separated ADE cost -> data-efficient departure-reduction lever that GENERALIZES, not yet a free upgrade
P2b_recovery_aug_ft.ft: decoder-only 8,634,505 trainable (frozen 90M encoder), 28 FT eps/617 windows, envelope 1.75m/5deg, lambda_dev 0.5, 1500 steps lr 1e-4; anchor-CE 1.93->0.99

held_out_paired_base_minus_ft_12eps_264w.overall_dADE2s: -0.288 [-0.428,-0.149] SEPARATED = FT WORSE ADE (base 0.587 -> ft 0.875) -- the drivability-vs-accuracy trade
held_out_paired_base_minus_ft_12eps_264w.generalization_contrast: Gate-1 real-junction FT held-out Δ≈0 (memorised n≈15); this synthetic-recovery FT SEPARATES on held-out eps

P2b_recovery_aug_ft.honest_bound: low-OOD LANE-KEEPING, not off-road/collision (needs AlpaSim); n=12 held-out eps; single seed/config; the ADE regression means DO NOT deploy this ckpt -- the pre-named fix is a gentler FT (larger lambda_dev / smaller lat_max / fewer steps) then AlpaSim
P2b_recovery_aug_ft.artifact: corridor_split_results.json / recovery_ft_eval.log / recovery_ft_train.log; ft ckpt on pod /workspace/refc-recovery-ft/ckpt.pt

P2c_gentle_ft_sweep.verdict: TRADE IS FUNDAMENTAL for decoder-only recovery-FT (pre-registered branch 2) -- NO net win; Pareto-bound
P2c_gentle_ft_sweep.pareto_frontier_overall_(dCDR,dADE): naive(+0.0089S,-0.288S) -> g2(+0.0057ns,-0.125S) -> g3(-0.0032S,-0.099S); g1 dominated. dADE separated-worse in ALL 4 (ADE never within noise of base 0.587).
P2c_gentle_ft_sweep.configs: g1(500,1.75,ldev1.0,1e-4)=dep-lost+ADE-worse; g2(700,1.0,ldev1.0,5e-5)=best balance (ftADE 0.713, junction dADE +0.133); g3(400,0.75,ldev2.0,5e-5)=too gentle, departs MORE
P2c_gentle_ft_sweep.refuted: 'fewer steps alone fixes ADE' -- g1 lost the departure win AND kept the full ADE cost
P2c_gentle_ft_sweep.cost_locus_MEASURED: ADE damage concentrated OFF-junction (junction dADE +0.029/+0.133 = FT better; overall dragged by longitudinal/straight) -> the frozen encoder barely encodes the offset (probe ratio ~0) so the decoder over-generalizes its reactivity
P2c_gentle_ft_sweep.next_mechanism: 1) return-to-GT-speed/progress term on the g2 config (decoder-only, WM-safe, targets the MEASURED longitudinal cost) then AlpaSim; 2) encoder-in-the-loop light-FT (higher ceiling, gate on plan-free canary) if 1 insufficient

P2d_return_to_gt_speed_term.verdict: COUPLING SURVIVES the progress term -> decoder-only recovery-FT is EXHAUSTED, NOT promotable (pre-registered branch 2)
P2d_return_to_gt_speed_term.added: --lambda-prog = extra L1 on the forward (x) recovery component, on g2
P2d_return_to_gt_speed_term.g2s1_lambda_prog_1.0: ftADE 1.007 (WORSE than g2 0.713 and base 0.587), dCDR -0.0064 ns (departs MORE), junction dADE +0.133->-0.131 S (destroyed g2's good property) -> destabilizes
P2d_return_to_gt_speed_term.g2s2_lambda_prog_2.5: ftADE 0.695 (ADE recovered toward base) BUT dCDR +0.0009 ns (departure win GONE) -> protects ADE only by restoring base behaviour
P2d_return_to_gt_speed_term.conclusion: no lambda_prog holds departures AND recovers ADE; dADE separated-worse in both. The ADE cost is decoder GLOBAL over-reactivity (forced by the frozen encoder not encoding the offset, P2a ratio ~0), NOT a forward-progress error a longitudinal term can fix. Encoder is the bottleneck (twice-confirmed).
P2d_return_to_gt_speed_term.sole_remaining_lever: encoder-in-the-loop light-FT (unfreeze last-k blocks / low lr_encoder ~5e-6), plan-free-CANARY-gated (WM must not degrade); recipe in INTAKE.md; needs a sanctioned arm + Sayed go

measured_results.eval_gpu_released: MEASURED (after each of 3 runs): gpu_lock status=FREE, GPU 0 MiB, no compute-apps, no D2 process running -- free for D1

additional_direction: modifies NOTHING running; REF-C deployed weights are read-only
one_line: In-envelope geometric recovery augmentation: teach REF-C to recover from an off-path pose (sensed only in pixels) by warping real frames with an analytic homography bounded to the MEASURED low-OOD envelope and supervising the return-to-path trajectory — the same warp operator the closed-loop instrument applies on-policy (train==test). Data-efficient (every window is a recovery example), renderer-free, non-self-referential.

builds_on_measured.free_floor_ruled_out: gate0b_gradient_results.json (junction offroad Δ0.000, every scene identical, yet every plan on-road) + wm_mpc_result.json (rung-3 tie) — the deficit is the EXECUTED covariate-shifted plan, not representability
builds_on_measured.covariate_shift_localised: LOOP_STATE G1prep: ego tracks plan 0.49m; plan_xte 0.57->12.98m on-policy = textbook covariate shift in the PLAN
builds_on_measured.gate1_data_bound: gate1_clean_loo.json: real-junction recovery FT memorises at n~15 (held-out recovery-L1 5.06->5.06, Δ≈0); CAT-K drops 49% catastrophic labels; λ_dev cuts held-out plan-shift -80%
builds_on_measured.dagger_self_referential: dagger_result.json: DAgger on the WM HURTS (closed ADE +0.266) — on-policy states are the WM's own off-manifold latents
builds_on_measured.envelope: P1_DECISION_GRADE_FINDINGS.md §1.2/1.3: lateral flat to 2.0m (sep 3m), yaw exact & ≤1.16x to 12°; both ~17x below NuRec's 3.2x
builds_on_measured.refc_pixels_only: source-read refc.py::RefCModel.forward — inputs are the 8-frame window + scalar v0; NO ego-history channel

novelty_vs_landscape.not_free_floor: a TRAINING change reshaping the executed plan from off-path states (Gate-0/0b only reshape the plan at a fixed on-path policy)
novelty_vs_landscape.not_gate1_FT: synthetic in-envelope recovery from EVERY window (data-efficient) vs real recovery from 15 junction scenes (memorised)
novelty_vs_landscape.not_dagger: real frame warped by analytic geometry vs the WM's own imagined off-manifold latent
novelty_vs_landscape.not_sim_rollout: homography of a real frame (in-distribution, P1-measured) vs NuRec at 3.2x OOD
novelty_vs_landscape.lever_accounting: encoder FROZEN — no new encoder-touching structural lever; a data/objective lever, door stays CLOSED (RETRACTION_LOG 07-21 C4)
